items.title: Accenture Doesn't Deserve Such Irrational Gloom (Rating Upgrade)
Apple initiated, Hershey upgraded: Wall Street’s top analyst calls
items.description: The most talked about and market moving research calls around Wall Street are now in one place. Here are today’s research calls that investors need to know, as compiled by The Fly. Top 5 Upgrades: Arete upgraded Baidu (BIDU) to Buy from Sell with a $143 price target. AI chips remain under-supplied within China and Baidu’s Kunlun chip venture has the potential to more than offset the struggling online advertising business, the firm tells investors. Citizens JMP upgraded CoreWeave (CRWV) to Outper

items.title: IBM And BharatGen Collaborate To Accelerate AI Adoption In India Powered By Indic Large Language Models
Quantinuum CEO Says It’s at a ‘Turning Point.’ The Company Is Achieving New Feats in Quantum Computing.
items.description: Quantinuum, the quantum computing company majority-owned by  Honeywell International  has come a long way this year.  CEO Rajeeb Hazra delivered the keynote speech at Quantum World Congress 2025 on Wednesday, during which he highlighted Quantinuum’s progress since last year’s event.  “Every year we’ve kicked the can down the road, but this feels like a turning point,” Hazra tells Barron’s. “And we drove it with these advancements.”

items.title: Quantum Computing Is the Missing Piece for AI, and These Stocks Could Benefit Most
items.description: The synergy between AI and quantum computing presents significant opportunities for this trio of companies.
